hooks.command: HOOK_DATA=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); printf '{"event":"idle_prompt","sessionId":"%s","data":%s}' "$CODEMAN_SESSION_ID" "$HOOK_DATA" | curl -s -X POST "$CODEMAN_API_URL/api/hook-event" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data @- 2>/dev/null || true

HOOK_DATA=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); printf '{"event":"permission_prompt","sessionId":"%s","data":%s}' "$CODEMAN_SESSION_ID" "$HOOK_DATA" | curl -s -X POST "$CODEMAN_API_URL/api/hook-event" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data @- 2>/dev/null || true

HOOK_DATA=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); printf '{"event":"elicitation_dialog","sessionId":"%s","data":%s}' "$CODEMAN_SESSION_ID" "$HOOK_DATA" | curl -s -X POST "$CODEMAN_API_URL/api/hook-event" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data @- 2>/dev/null || true

HOOK_DATA=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); printf '{"event":"stop","sessionId":"%s","data":%s}' "$CODEMAN_SESSION_ID" "$HOOK_DATA" | curl -s -X POST "$CODEMAN_API_URL/api/hook-event" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data @- 2>/dev/null || true

HOOK_DATA=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); printf '{"event":"teammate_idle","sessionId":"%s","data":%s}' "$CODEMAN_SESSION_ID" "$HOOK_DATA" | curl -s -X POST "$CODEMAN_API_URL/api/hook-event" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data @- 2>/dev/null || true

HOOK_DATA=$(cat 2>/dev/null || echo '{}'); printf '{"event":"task_completed","sessionId":"%s","data":%s}' "$CODEMAN_SESSION_ID" "$HOOK_DATA" | curl -s -X POST "$CODEMAN_API_URL/api/hook-event" -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data @- 2>/dev/null || true
